[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2009/role/negatedLabel) (en-US) Decrease (increase) in derivatives, at fair value -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/terseLabel) (en-US) Proceeds from shares of common stock sold -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Proceeds from Issuance of Common Stock -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Derivative Asset, Subject to Master Netting Arrangement, before Offset -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/terseLabel) (en-US) Net realized and unrealized gain (loss) on derivatives -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Measurement Input, Long-Term Revenue Growth Rate [Member] -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Measurement Input, Risk Free Interest Rate [Member] -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Derivative Instruments and Hedging Activities Disclosure [Text Block] -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Proceeds from Issuance of Long-Term Debt -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Common Stock, Par or Stated Value Per Share -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/terseLabel) (en-US) Deferred Financing Costs and Debt Issuance Costs -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Derivatives, Offsetting Fair Value Amounts, Policy [Policy Text Block] -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Use of Estimates, Policy [Policy Text Block] -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Line of Credit Facility, Unused Capacity, Commitment Fee Percentage -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/terseLabel) (en-US) Summary of the average and maximum debt outstanding, and the interest and debt issuance cost -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/verboseLabel) (en-US) Weighted-average interest rate, excluding amortized debt issuance cost -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/terseLabel) (en-US) Schedule of fair values of investments disaggregated into three levels of fair value hierarchy -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Fair Value, Assets Measured on Recurring and Nonrecurring Basis [Table Text Block] -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/terseLabel) (en-US) Schedule of unobservable inputs used in the fair value measurement of Level 3 investments -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Fair Value Measurement Inputs and Valuation Techniques [Table Text Block] -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/terseLabel) (en-US) Schedule of dividends declared and paid -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Unrealized Gain (Loss), Foreign Currency Transaction, before Tax -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2009/role/negatedLabel) (en-US) Change in net unrealized (appreciation)/depreciation of foreign currency investments -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Debt and Equity Securities, Unrealized Gain (Loss) -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2009/role/negatedLabel) (en-US) Change in net unrealized (appreciation)/depreciation of investments -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Fees, Expenses, Agreements and Related Party Transactions -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Investment, Variable Interest Rate, Type [Extensible Enumeration] -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Investment, Interest Rate, Paid in Kind -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Related Party Transaction, Amounts of Transaction -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/terseLabel) (en-US) Fees, Expenses, Agreements and Related Party Transactions -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/terseLabel) (en-US) Fees, Expenses, Agreements and Related Party Transactions -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Interest Income, Operating, Paid in Cash -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Interest Income, Operating, Paid in Kind -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2009/role/negatedLabel) (en-US) PIK interest and other income capitalized -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Interest and Dividend Income, Operating, Paid in Kind -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/totalLabel) (en-US) Total operating expenses, net of expense reimbursement -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Investment Company, Expense, after Reduction of Fee Waiver and Reimbursement -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Investment Income, Operating, after Expense and Tax -

[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Proceeds from Disposition of Investment, Operating Activity -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/terseLabel) (en-US) Summary of unfunded commitments under revolving loan facilities and other commitments -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Schedule of Fair Value, off-Balance-Sheet Risks [Table Text Block] -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Dividends Payable, Date to be Paid -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Investment Company, Expense, after Reduction of Fee Waiver and Reimbursement [Abstract] -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2009/role/negatedLabel) (en-US) Decrease (increase) in receivable for investments sold -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Increase (Decrease) in Receivable for Investment Sold -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/terseLabel) (en-US) Increase (decrease) in payable for investments purchased -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Increase (Decrease) in Payable for Investment Purchased -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/totalLabel) (en-US) Net change in net unrealized appreciation (depreciation) -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Unrealized Gain (Loss), Investment, Derivative, and Foreign Currency Transaction Price Change, Operating, after Tax -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Gain (Loss), Investment, Derivative, and Foreign Currency Transaction Price Change, Operating, after Tax -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Realized Gain (Loss), Foreign Currency Transaction, Excluding Investment Price Change, after Tax -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2009/role/negatedLabel) (en-US) Net realized (gain) loss on foreign currency debt -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2009/role/negatedLabel) (en-US) Change in net unrealized (appreciation)/depreciation of foreign currency debt -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Unrealized Gain (Loss), Foreign Currency Transaction, Excluding Investment Price Change, after Tax -

[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/terseLabel) (en-US) Common stock issued from reinvestment of distributions -
